prerequisites: An Alpha Vantage account: register on the Alpha Vantage support page to claim a free API key.
A free Alpha Vantage API key. Free-tier keys are rate limited; higher-volume premium plans are available.
The equity ticker symbol you want to pull data for (for example, IBM), supplied via the required `symbol` config field.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a single Alpha Vantage API key, supplied through the connector's `api_key` secret field. Alpha Vantage passes the key as the `apikey` query-string parameter on each request (for example, `...&apikey=demo`). Claim a free key by registering on the Alpha Vantage support page.

setupSteps.title: Claim a free Alpha Vantage API key
setupSteps.body: Go to the Alpha Vantage support page (https://www.alphavantage.co/support/) and fill out the registration form to claim your free API key. Use a legitimate email address, since that is how Alpha Vantage contacts you about announcements and troubleshooting.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the key in the connector's required `api_key` field. The connector sends it to Alpha Vantage as the `apikey` query parameter on each API call.

setupSteps.title: Set the target symbol
setupSteps.body: Set the required `symbol` field to the equity ticker you want to query (for example, IBM). This selects which security the time-series request returns.

setupSteps.title: Tune the optional request parameters
setupSteps.body: Optionally set `interval` for intraday data; accepted values are 1min, 5min, 15min, 30min, and 60min. Set `outputsize` to `compact` for the latest 100 data points or `full` for the larger trailing window. Set `adjusted` to control split/dividend adjustment; it defaults to true, so set it to false for raw as-traded values.

sources.title: Alpha Vantage Support (claim free API key)
